mapper.sql: id, user_id, qq_song_id, title, artist, src, duration_sec, source_url, sort_order, play_count, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_music_track WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
SELECT FROM user_music_track WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND play_count > 0 ORDER BY play_count DESC, created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_music_track WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
